patches.summary: Remove mcp:read-only annotation from expense-untagged; --auto-fix PUTs to Zoho.
patches.reason: MCP hosts use the read-only hint to skip per-call confirmation. --auto-fix is a real mutation (PUT /expenses/{id}); leaving the hint on misleads hosts.

patches.summary: Round Base first, then derive tax from rounded Base, and split CGST/SGST asymmetrically so sum equals Total.
patches.reason: Independent rounding of CGST and SGST drifted 1 paise on common amounts (₹100 @ 18% yielded 100.01). India tax filings require Base + CGST + SGST == Total. Patched per Greptile P1.
patches.validated_outcome: New TestComputeSplit_SumEqualsTotal covers ₹100/18%, ₹99.99/12%, ₹1234.56/5%, and inter-state cases.

patches.summary: Collapse the dead 6h initializer; staleAfter is just the 168h literal.
patches.reason: Template emitted `staleAfter := 6*time.Hour; if d, err := time.ParseDuration("168h"); err == nil { staleAfter = d }` — the literal ParseDuration never errors, so 6h was always overwritten. Patched per Greptile P2.
patches.upstream_issue: TODO: file upstream — generator's auto_refresh template should emit the literal directly when the cache stale_after is a constant.

patches.summary: close --auto-submit blocks only when an expense being newly bundled is still processing (intersection of processing AND unreported), not just any processing expense in the month.
patches.reason: Two-iteration patch (Greptile flagged twice): original guard refused --auto-submit whenever any month-expense was still in Processing, even when that expense was already on a prior report. A stale autoscan from last week should not block this month's new batch. Now the guard intersects processing AND reportID == "" so only to-be-bundled expenses count.

patches.summary: Replace LookupHash-then-RecordHash with ReserveHash/ConfirmHash/ReleaseHash reservation pattern in invoice ingest to close the parallel-duplicate-content race.
patches.reason: Parallel goroutines processing files with identical SHA256 all saw the hash missing, all POSTed to /expenses, all received distinct expense_ids; only the last RecordHash won and the earlier uploads became ghost expenses no future hash gate could catch. Reservation pattern claims the slot atomically (INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING + RowsAffected) before upload; failed uploads release the sentinel; successful uploads confirm with the real expense_id. Filed per Greptile P1.
patches.validated_outcome: TestReserveHash_ParallelDuplicateClaimsExactlyOne spawns 20 goroutines on the same hash; exactly one claims.

patches.summary: close ALWAYS calls forceRefreshExpenses before reading the local store; dead 1h threshold constant removed.
patches.reason: Three-iteration patch (Greptile flagged across three review rounds): (1) original commit added ensureFreshForResources for the default path but routed --no-cache through it with dataSource=live, which short-circuits at the data-source guard. (2) second iteration extracted forceRefreshExpenses() so --no-cache actually triggered runAutoRefresh directly, but kept a closeStalenessThreshold constant that was never wired (ensureFreshForResources still used the global 168h policy, so the default-path back-to-back close double-bundled). (3) final iteration: close always calls forceRefreshExpenses unconditionally; --no-cache is retained as a no-op flag for back-compat but routes through the same path. Dead constant removed. Trade-off: one extra GET per monthly close run, which is negligible compared to the data-corruption mode it prevents.

patches.summary: Bucket race-skipped invoice ingest results into skipped (not ingested); reclaim stale ReserveHash sentinels older than 30 minutes so crashed runs do not permanently quarantine a file.
patches.reason: Two issues in one Greptile P1 finding on the original TOCTOU fix: (1) the aggregation loop only special-cased status=duplicate, so race-skipped sentinel results landed in ingested without an expense_id, inflating the uploaded count; (2) if a run crashed between ReserveHash and ConfirmHash/ReleaseHash, the sentinel row was orphaned forever and every retry returned race-skipped until the user discovered --force. Fix (1): bucket by status != uploaded. Fix (2): ReserveHash now reclaims sentinels older than ReservationTTL (default 30 min) before inserting a fresh row.
patches.validated_outcome: TestReserveHash_ReclaimsStaleSentinel + TestReserveHash_DoesNotReclaimFreshSentinel + the existing parallel-claim regression all pass.

patches.summary: expense-untagged --auto-fix refreshes the expenses table first so it cannot overwrite categories a user set in the Zoho UI since the last sync.
patches.reason: Without the refresh, the local store can be up to cache.stale_after hours old. A user who tagged an expense manually in Zoho since the last sync still appears category_id= locally, and --auto-fix PUTs the merchant-memory category onto it, silently overwriting the manual choice. Plain listing (no --auto-fix) keeps the normal freshness policy because stale data is acceptable for review. Filed per Greptile P1.

patches.summary: close --auto-submit submission errors are now printed to stderr on the human-readable path; previously only --json consumers saw them.
patches.reason: POST /expensereports/{id}/submit failures were stashed in summary["submit_error"] but the non-JSON output branch never read it. Users running close --auto-submit interactively saw "bundled N into report_id=..." and assumed success, while the report sat on Zoho as a draft. Filed per Greptile P1.
